caption:
The neon rain kissed my skin like liquid fire. ⛈️🔥 I adjusted the high-gloss collar of my synth-leather harness, feeling the cool air bite at my neck. Below me, the mega-city sprawled like a circuit board of glass and chrome.

Across the floating barge, the target waited. A shadowy figure, but I could feel the magnetic pull of the moment. My thighs brushed against the heated metal of the hover-skimmer as I leaped. The fabric clung to every curve, a high-collared bodysuit of carbon-fiber lace that whispered secrets against my thighs. My breasts and hips were concealed beneath layers of strategic mesh and synthetic silk.

I could feel the heat radiating from his touch, a spark of static electricity between our lips. He leaned in, the holographic lights dancing off his chrome implants. My pulse hammered against my ribs, a secret rhythm only we knew.

In a world of wires and code, this was the only real thing. A stolen breath in the rain, a whisper against the mic, the thrill of being wanted. We moved into the shadows, disappearing into the neon grid, just two pieces of data in the system of desire. 💋🌃
